tools.name: apply-patch
tools.description: Apply unified diff patches to files atomically.

tools.name: browser-discover-elements
tools.description: Discover all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, selects, etc.) on the active browser tab. Returns a list of elements with their CSS selectors, text content, and attributes.

tools.name: browser-dom-action
tools.description: Perform a DOM interaction on the active browser tab. Supports: click, type, select, clear, scroll, hover, press Enter, check/uncheck.

tools.name: browser-navigate
tools.description: Navigate the active browser tab to a URL. Waits for the page to finish loading before returning.

tools.name: browser-read-active-tab
tools.description: Read the active browser tab. Returns the page title, URL, and visible text content.

tools.name: browser-screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the active browser tab as a base64-encoded PNG image.

tools.name: browser-tab-manage
tools.description: Manage browser tabs: list all tabs, create a new tab, close a tab, or switch to a tab.

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Performs string replacements in files with fuzzy matching support.

tools.name: file-to-markdown
tools.description: Converts files to Markdown format. Supports PDF, Microsoft Office (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx), LibreOffice (.odt, .ods, .odp), and ZIP archives. Does not support .7z archives.

tools.name: glob
tools.description: Find files matching a glob pattern. Returns matching file paths sorted by modification time.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in files using regular expressions.

tools.name: ls
tools.description: List directory contents with tree formatting.

tools.name: multiedit
tools.description: Performs multiple string replacements in a single file atomically.

tools.name: question
tools.description: Ask the user structured questions and get typed answers back as tool results.

tools.name: read-file
tools.description: Read a file or directory from the filesystem.

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Execute a shell command in a persistent session.

tools.name: tavily-crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website and extract content from multiple pages using the Tavily API.

tools.name: tavily-extract
tools.description: Extract structured content from URLs using the Tavily API.

tools.name: tavily-map
tools.description: Discover and map URLs on a website without extracting content using the Tavily API.

tools.name: tavily-search
tools.description: Perform web searches using Tavily's search API.

tools.name: todoread
tools.description: Read the current task list for the session from SQLite database.

tools.name: todowrite
tools.description: Update the task list for the current session in SQLite database.

tools.name: webfetch
tools.description: Fetch content from a URL and convert to readable format.

tools.name: write-file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating it if it doesn't exist or overwriting if it does.

TAVILY_API_KEY.description: API key for Tavily web search/crawl/extract/map tools

TODOS_DB_PATH.description: Custom path for the todos SQLite database. Must be an absolute path.
